title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to join our growing team. You will be building beautiful, performant web applications using React and modern tooling.
responsibilities: Build and maintain high-quality React applications
Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Mentor junior developers on best practices
Participate in code reviews and architecture discussions
requirements: Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Experience with Tailwind CSS or similar frameworks
Familiarity with REST APIs and Git

title: Product Designer
description: Organic Media is hiring a Product Designer to craft calm, beautiful digital experiences. You will own the design process from research to final delivery.
responsibilities: Lead end-to-end product design for web and mobile
Conduct user research and usability testing
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
Maintain and evolve our design system
Work closely with engineers to ensure design quality

title: Backend Engineer
description: Arbor Tech is looking for a Backend Engineer to help build scalable APIs and services. You will work on exciting infrastructure challenges in a remote-first team.
responsibilities: Design and build RESTful APIs
Optimize database queries and performance
Write unit and integration tests
Collaborate with frontend teams on API contracts
Deploy and monitor services on cloud platforms
requirements: Knowledge of Docker and CI/CD pipelines

title: Customer Success Lead
description: Grove Labs is hiring a Customer Success Lead to build long-lasting relationships with our clients and ensure they get the most out of our platform.
responsibilities: Onboard new customers and guide them through the platform
Build strong relationships with key accounts
Track customer health metrics and reduce churn
Gather product feedback and share with the team
Create helpful resources and documentation
requirements: 2+ years in customer success or account management
Experience with CRM tools like HubSpot

title: Data Analyst
description: Razorleaf is looking for a Data Analyst to turn complex data into clear insights that drive business decisions.
responsibilities: Analyze large datasets to find trends and insights
Build dashboards and reports using BI tools
Work with product and marketing teams on data needs
Ensure data quality and accuracy
Present findings to stakeholders
requirements: Experience with Tableau or Power BI
Basic knowledge of Python or R

title: React Developer
description: Nestwork is hiring a React Developer to build modern, scalable frontend applications. You will work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Develop new features using React and Tailwind
Integrate REST APIs into frontend applications
Write reusable, testable components
Optimize app performance
Collaborate with backend and design teams

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Clearpath Studio is looking for a UI/UX Designer to create beautiful and intuitive interfaces for our clients across various industries.
responsibilities: Design user interfaces for web and mobile apps
Create user flows, wireframes and prototypes
Conduct user interviews and usability testing
Collaborate with developers during implementation
Maintain design consistency across products

title: Marketing Manager
description: Bloom Digital is hiring a Marketing Manager to lead our brand and growth initiatives. You will own campaigns, content strategy, and performance marketing.
responsibilities: Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns
Manage SEO, SEM, and social media channels
Analyze campaign performance and optimize
Collaborate with design and content teams
Build and manage the marketing budget
requirements: Strong knowledge of Google Ads and Meta Ads
